sentences.target: Wir suchen noch ein Quartier für die Nacht.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈzuːxən nɔx aɪ̯n kvaʁˈtiːɐ̯ fyːɐ̯ diː naxt./

translations.de: Wir suchen noch ein Quartier für die Nacht.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈzuːxən nɔx aɪ̯n kvaʁˈtiːɐ̯ fyːɐ̯ diː naxt./
translations.en: We’re still looking for a place for the night.
translations.es: Todavía estamos buscando alojamiento para esta noche.
translations.fr: On cherche encore un endroit où passer la nuit.
translations.it: Stiamo ancora cercando un posto per stanotte.
translations.ko: 우리는 아직 오늘 밤 머물 곳을 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们还在找今晚的住处。
translations.yue: 我哋仲喺搵今晚住嘅地方。
translations.ru: Мы всё ещё ищем, где переночевать.
translations.pt: Ainda estamos procurando um lugar para passar a noite.
translations.tr: Hâlâ bu gece kalacak bir yer arıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi vẫn đang tìm chỗ ở cho tối nay.
translations.ar: ما زلنا نبحث عن مكان للمبيت الليلة.
translations.nl: We zijn nog op zoek naar een slaapplek voor vannacht.
translations.uk: Ми все ще шукаємо, де переночувати.
translations.hi: हम अभी भी आज रात ठहरने की जगह ढूंढ़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε ακόμα για μέρος να μείνουμε απόψε.
translations.nb: Vi leter fortsatt etter et sted å sove i natt.
translations.id: Kami masih mencari tempat untuk menginap malam ini.
translations.sv: Vi letar fortfarande efter ett ställe att sova i natt.
translations.ro: Încă mai căutăm un loc unde să stăm peste noapte.
translations.da: Vi leder stadig efter et sted at sove i nat.
translations.ja: 今夜泊まる場所をまだ探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; governs the direct object 'ein Quartier'.
Adverb modifying the verb, indicating continuation/additionality ('still').
Indefinite article, accusative neuter singular; determines 'Quartier' as the direct object.
Common noun, neuter, accusative singular; direct object of 'suchen'.
Preposition assigning accusative; heads the PP 'für die Nacht' (temporal adjunct).
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; determines 'Nacht' after 'für'.
Common noun, feminine, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für' indicating time.

sentences.target: Das Quartier ist klein, aber es ist sauber.
sentences.reading: /das kvaʁˈtiːɐ̯ ɪst klaɪ̯n, ˈaːbɐ ɛs ɪst ˈzaʊ̯bɐ./

translations.de: Das Quartier ist klein, aber es ist sauber.
translations.ipa: /das kvaʁˈtiːɐ̯ ɪst klaɪ̯n, ˈaːbɐ ɛs ɪst ˈzaʊ̯bɐ./
translations.en: The place is small, but it’s clean.
translations.es: La habitación es pequeña, pero está limpia.
translations.fr: La chambre est petite, mais elle est propre.
translations.it: La stanza è piccola, ma è pulita.
translations.pt: O quarto é pequeno, mas está limpo.
translations.nl: De kamer is klein, maar schoon.
translations.hi: कमरा छोटा है, लेकिन साफ़ है.
translations.el: Το δωμάτιο είναι μικρό, αλλά είναι καθαρό.
translations.ro: Camera e mică, dar e curată.
translations.ja: 部屋は狭いけど、きれいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative neuter singular; determines the subject 'Quartier'.
Common noun, neuter, nominative singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective in positive degree; complements the copula 'ist'.
Coordinating conjunction introducing a contrasting clause.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular neuter, nominative; subject of the second clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links 'es' to 'sauber'.
Predicate adjective in positive degree; complements the copula in the second clause.

sentences.target: Ich habe ein Quartier in der Innenstadt.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə aɪ̯n kvaʁˈtiːɐ̯ ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈɪnənʃtat./

translations.de: Ich habe ein Quartier in der Innenstadt.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə aɪ̯n kvaʁˈtiːɐ̯ ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈɪnənʃtat./
translations.en: I have a place in the city center.
translations.es: Tengo un lugar en el centro.
translations.ru: У меня есть где остановиться в центре.
translations.pt: Eu tenho um lugar no centro.
translations.vi: Tôi có chỗ ở ngay trung tâm.
translations.nl: Ik heb een plek in het centrum.
translations.uk: У мене є де зупинитися в центрі міста.
translations.hi: मेरे पास शहर के केंद्र में रहने की जगह है.
translations.el: Έχω ένα μέρος στο κέντρο της πόλης.
translations.nb: Jeg har et sted i sentrum.
translations.id: Saya punya tempat di pusat kota.
translations.sv: Jag har ett ställe i centrum.
translations.ro: Am un loc în centrul orașului.
translations.da: Jeg har et sted i centrum.
translations.ja: 市の中心に泊まる場所があります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes 'ein Quartier' as direct object.
Indefinite article, accusative neuter singular; determines 'Quartier'.
Common noun, neuter, accusative singular; direct object of 'habe'.
Preposition; here used locatively with dative, heads the PP 'in der Innenstadt'.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; required by 'in' in a static location reading; determines 'Innenstadt'.
Common noun, feminine, dative singular; object of the preposition 'in'.

sentences.target: Sie kennt das Quartier schon seit Jahren.
sentences.reading: /ziː kɛnt das kvaʁˈtiːɐ̯ ʃoːn zaɪ̯t ˈjaːʁən./

translations.de: Sie kennt das Quartier schon seit Jahren.
translations.ipa: /ziː kɛnt das kvaʁˈtiːɐ̯ ʃoːn zaɪ̯t ˈjaːʁən./
translations.en: She has known the neighborhood for years.
translations.es: Ella conoce el barrio desde hace años.
translations.fr: Elle connaît le quartier depuis des années.
translations.ko: 그녀는 그 동네를 오랫동안 잘 알아요.
translations.yue: 佢對呢個社區好熟，已經好多年。
translations.ru: Она знает этот район уже много лет.
translations.pt: Ela conhece o bairro há anos.
translations.he: היא מכירה את השכונה כבר שנים.
translations.vi: Cô ấy quen thuộc khu phố này đã nhiều năm rồi.
translations.ar: هي تعرف هذا الحي منذ سنوات.
translations.nl: Ze kent de buurt al jaren.
translations.uk: Вона знає цей район вже багато років.
translations.hu: Már évek óta ismeri ezt a környéket.
translations.hi: वह इस मोहल्ले को वर्षों से जानती है.
translations.pl: Ona zna tę okolicę od lat.
translations.el: Ξέρει αυτή τη γειτονιά εδώ και χρόνια.
translations.nb: Hun har kjent nabolaget i mange år.
translations.id: Dia sudah mengenal lingkungan ini selama bertahun-tahun.
translations.sv: Hon har känt till området i många år.
translations.ro: Ea cunoaște cartierul de ani buni.
translations.da: Hun har kendt kvarteret i mange år.
translations.fi: Hän on tuntenut tämän naapuruston jo vuosia.
translations.ja: 彼女はこの近所を長年知っています。

Definite article, accusative neuter singular; determines 'Quartier' as the direct object.

Adverb modifying the clause; emphasizes duration with 'seit Jahren' ('already for years').
Preposition assigning dative; introduces a temporal span 'seit Jahren'.
